
Evaluate your own output against the rubric below.
Be honest and critical. Return ONLY a YAML block:

```yaml
score: <0-100 integer>
dimensions:
  accuracy: <0-100>
  clarity: <0-100>
  completeness: <0-100>
  efficiency: <0-100>
  usefulness: <0-100>
notes: "<one sentence explaining the score>"
```

Do not include any other text. Just the YAML block.


## YOUR OUTPUT
# Icon System Architecture — Deliverable

**Generated by:** icon-system-architect  
**Run ID:** run-20260626-000800  
**Date:** 2026-06-26

---

## 1. SVG Sprite Sheet — 24 Common Icons

The sprite sheet below uses `<symbol>` elements with unique `id` attributes. Include it inline at the top of your HTML `<body>` (hidden, accessible via `<use href="#id">`). Every icon uses `fill="currentColor"` (or no `fill` at all) so it inherits color from CSS — with the exception of a few that need multiple tones; those use CSS custom properties.

```html
<!--
  ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
  ║  Icon Sprite Sheet — 24 Common Icons           ║
  ║  Licensed MIT. Embed once per page.            ║
  ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
-->
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="display:none;" aria-hidden="true">

  <!-- ===== NAVIGATION & UI ===== -->

  <!-- 1. Home -->
  <symbol id="icon-home" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <path d="M3 9.5L12 3l9 6.5V20a1 1 0 0 1-1 1h-5v-7H9v7H4a1 1 0 0 1-1-1V9.5z"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 2. Search (magnifying glass) -->
  <symbol id="icon-search" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <circle cx="10.5" cy="10.5" r="6.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="15.5" y1="15.5" x2="21" y2="21" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 3. Menu (hamburger) -->
  <symbol id="icon-menu" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <line x1="3" y1="6" x2="21" y2="6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="3" y1="18" x2="21" y2="18" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 4. Close (X) -->
  <symbol id="icon-close" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 5. Chevron Down -->
  <symbol id="icon-chevron-down" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 6. Chevron Up -->
  <symbol id="icon-chevron-up" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <polyline points="18 15 12 9 6 15" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 7. Chevron Left -->
  <symbol id="icon-chevron-left" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <polyline points="15 6 9 12 15 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 8. Chevron Right -->
  <symbol id="icon-chevron-right" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <polyline points="9 6 15 12 9 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 9. Arrow Right -->
  <symbol id="icon-arrow-right" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <line x1="3" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <polyline points="14 7 19 12 14 17" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 10. Arrow Left -->
  <symbol id="icon-arrow-left" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <line x1="21" y1="12" x2="5" y2="12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <polyline points="10 7 5 12 10 17" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- ===== ACTIONS ===== -->

  <!-- 11. Plus -->
  <symbol id="icon-plus" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 12. Minus -->
  <symbol id="icon-minus" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 13. Check (tick) -->
  <symbol id="icon-check" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <polyline points="4 13 9 18 20 6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 14. Edit (pencil) -->
  <symbol id="icon-edit" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <path d="M16.5 3.5a2.12 2.12 0 0 1 3 3L7 19l-4 1 1-4L16.5 3.5z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 15. Trash (delete) -->
  <symbol id="icon-trash" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <path d="M8 6V4a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h6a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v2m3 0v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6h14z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <line x1="10" y1="11" x2="10" y2="17" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="14" y1="11" x2="14" y2="17" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 16. Refresh / Reload -->
  <symbol id="icon-refresh" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <polyline points="1 4 1 10 7 10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <polyline points="23 20 23 14 17 14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <path d="M20.49 9A9 9 0 0 0 5.64 5.64L1 10m22 4l-4.64 4.36A9 9 0 0 1 3.51 15" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 17. Download -->
  <symbol id="icon-download" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 18. Upload -->
  <symbol id="icon-upload" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <polyline points="17 8 12 3 7 8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="15" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- ===== STATUS & FEEDBACK ===== -->

  <!-- 19. Info (circle-i) -->
  <symbol id="icon-info" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12" y2="11" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="12" cy="8" r="1" fill="currentColor"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 20. Warning (triangle-exclamation) -->
  <symbol id="icon-warning" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <path d="M10.29 3.86L1.82 18a2 2 0 0 0 1.71 3h16.94a2 2 0 0 0 1.71-3L13.71 3.86a2 2 0 0 0-3.42 0z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <line x1="12" y1="9" x2="12" y2="13" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="12" cy="17" r="1" fill="currentColor"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 21. Error (circle-X) -->
  <symbol id="icon-error" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="15" y1="9" x2="9" y2="15" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="9" y1="9" x2="15" y2="15" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 22. Success (circle-check) -->
  <symbol id="icon-success" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
    <polyline points="7 12 10.5 15.5 17 9" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- ===== COMMON OBJECTS ===== -->

  <!-- 23. User / Person -->
  <symbol id="icon-user" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <circle cx="12" cy="8" r="4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M4 21v-1a6 6 0 0 1 6-6h4a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v1" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </symbol>

  <!-- 24. Settings (gear) -->
  <symbol id="icon-settings" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M19.4 15a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 .33 1.82l.06.06a2 2 0 0 1-2.83 2.83l-.06-.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82-.33 1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1 1.51V21a2 2 0 0 1-4 0v-.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 9 19.4a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82.33l-.06.06a2 2 0 0 1-2.83-2.83l.06-.06A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 4.68 15a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51-1H3a2 2 0 0 1 0-4h.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 4.6 9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-.33-1.82l-.06-.06a2 2 0 0 1 2.83-2.83l.06.06A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 9 4.68a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1-1.51V3a2 2 0 0 1 4 0v.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1 1.51 1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.82-.33l.06-.06a2 2 0 0 1 2.83 2.83l-.06.06A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 19.4 9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.51 1H21a2 2 0 0 1 0 4h-.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51 1z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </symbol>

</svg>
```

---

## 2. CSS — Sizing, Color Inheritance & Utilities

```css
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
   Icon System CSS
   — Sizing classes: .icon-sm, .icon-md, .icon-lg, .icon-xl
   — Color inheritance via currentColor
   — Accessible focus rings
   — Icon + text button patterns
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ── Base Icon Wrapper ───────────────────────────── */
.icon {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;

  /* Inline SVG fills inherit color automatically */
  color: inherit;
}

.icon svg {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}

/* ── Sizing Scale ────────────────────────────────── */
/* sm = 16px   (compact UI, inline with body text)    */
.icon-sm {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
}

/* md = 24px   (default, standard icon size)          */
.icon-md {
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
}

/* lg = 32px   (prominent UI, card headers)           */
.icon-lg {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
}

/* xl = 48px   (hero sections, empty states)          */
.icon-xl {
  width: 48px;
  height: 48px;
}

/* ── Color Variants (applied to parent, flows down) ── */
.icon-color-default   { color: currentColor; }
.icon-color-primary   { color: var(--color-primary,   #2563eb); }
.icon-color-secondary { color: var(--color-secondary, #64748b); }
.icon-color-success   { color: var(--color-success,   #16a34a); }
.icon-color-warning   { color: var(--color-warning,   #d97706); }
.icon-color-danger    { color: var(--color-danger,    #dc2626); }
.icon-color-muted     { color: var(--color-muted,     #94a3b8); }

/* ── Focus Ring (accessibility) ──────────────────── */
.icon:focus-visible {
  outline: 2px solid var(--color-primary, #2563eb);
  outline-offset: 2px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

/* ── Spinner animation for icon-refresh ──────────── */
.icon-spin {
  animation: icon-spin 1s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes icon-spin {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
   ICON + TEXT BUTTON PATTERNS
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Shared button reset */
.icon-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5em;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: inherit;
  line-height: 1;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
  user-select: none;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.icon-btn:focus-visible {
  outline: 2px solid var(--color-primary, #2563eb);
  outline-offset: 2px;
}

.icon-btn:disabled {
  opacity: 0.5;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

/* ── Pattern A: Icon-Only Button ─────────────────── */
.icon-btn--icon-only {
  padding: 0.5em;
  border-radius: 0.375em;
  background: transparent;
  color: inherit;
}

.icon-btn--icon-only:hover {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}

/* ── Pattern B: Icon + Label (horizontal) ────────── */
.icon-btn--labeled {
  padding: 0.5em 0.875em;
  border-radius: 0.375em;
  background: var(--color-primary, #2563eb);
  color: #fff;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.icon-btn--labeled:hover {
  filter: brightness(1.1);
}

.icon-btn--labeled:active {
  filter: brightness(0.95);
}

/* ── Pattern C: Icon-Trailing (text then icon) ───── */
.icon-btn--trailing {
  flex-direction: row-reverse;
}

/* ── Pattern D: Ghost Button ─────────────────────── */
.icon-btn--ghost {
  padding: 0.5em 0.75em;
  border-radius: 0.375em;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--color-primary, #2563eb);
  border: 1px solid transparent;
}

.icon-btn--ghost:hover {
  background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.08);
  border-color: currentColor;
}

/* ── Pattern E: Pill Button ──────────────────────── */
.icon-btn--pill {
  padding: 0.5em 1.25em;
  border-radius: 9999px;
  background: var(--color-primary, #2563eb);
  color: #fff;
}

.icon-btn--pill:hover {
  filter: brightness(1.1);
}

/* ── Sizing for icon inside buttons ──────────────── */
.icon-btn .icon-sm { width: 14px; height: 14px; }
.icon-btn .icon-md { width: 20px; height: 20px; }
.icon-btn .icon-lg { width: 26px; height: 26px; }
```

---

## 3. Accessibility Labels — ARIA Patterns

Every icon requires an accessible name. Use one of the three patterns below depending on context.

### 3.1 Standalone Icon Button (no visible text)

```html
<!-- ✅ CORRECT: aria-label describes the action -->
<button class="icon-btn icon-btn--icon-only" aria-label="Close dialog">
  <span class="icon icon-md" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg><use href="#icon-close"/></svg>
  </span>
</button>

<!-- ❌ WRONG: no accessible name -->
<button class="icon-btn icon-btn--icon-only">
  <svg><use href="#icon-close"/></svg>
</button>
```

### 3.2 Icon + Visible Text Button

```html
<!-- ✅ CORRECT: icon is decorative, hidden from screen readers -->
<button class="icon-btn icon-btn--labeled">
  <span class="icon icon-md" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg><use href="#icon-plus"/></svg>
  </span>
  Add Item
</button>
```

### 3.3 Icon Inside Interactive Elements (links, tab triggers)

```html
<!-- ✅ CORRECT: icon is decorative -->
<a href="/settings" class="icon-btn icon-btn--ghost">
  <span class="icon icon-md" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg><use href="#icon-settings"/></svg>
  </span>
  Settings
</a>
```

### 3.4 Informational Icons (status, alerts)

```html
<!-- ✅ CORRECT: use role="img" + aria-label when icon conveys meaning -->
<div class="alert alert--warning" role="alert">
  <span class="icon icon-md" role="img" aria-label="Warning">
    <svg><use href="#icon-warning"/></svg>
  </span>
  <p>Your session will expire in 5 minutes.</p>
</div>

<!-- ✅ For purely decorative icons, always aria-hidden="true" -->
<h2>
  <span class="icon icon-lg" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg><use href="#icon-user"/></svg>
  </span>
  Profile
</h2>
```

### 3.5 CSS `::after` Injected Icons (not recommended for critical content)

```css
/* WARNING: CSS-injected icons are invisible to screen readers.
   Only use for decorative flourishes, never for interactive elements. */
.external-link::after {
  content: "";
  display: inline-block;
  width: 1em;
  height: 1em;
  margin-left: 0.25em;
  background-color: currentColor;
  mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,..."); /* or reference sprite */
  mask-size: contain;
  -webkit-mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,...");
  -webkit-mask-size: contain;
}
```

---

## 4. HTML Usage Examples — The Full Catalog

```html
<!-- ── Icon-Only Button ──────────────────────────── -->
<button class="icon-btn icon-btn--icon-only" aria-label="Open menu">
  <span class="icon icon-md icon-color-default" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><use href="#icon-menu"/></svg>
  </span>
</button>

<!-- ── Primary Action Button (icon + label) ──────── -->
<button class="icon-btn icon-btn--labeled">
  <span class="icon icon-md" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><use href="#icon-plus"/></svg>
  </span>
  Create New
</button>

<!-- ── Ghost Delete Button (trailing icon) ──────── ──>
<button class="icon-btn icon-btn--ghost icon-btn--trailing icon-color-danger">
  <span class="icon icon-md" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><use href="#icon-trash"/></svg>
  </span>
  Delete
</button>

<!-- ── Pill-Shaped Download Button ───────────────── -->
<a href="/export" download class="icon-btn icon-btn--pill">
  <span class="icon icon-md" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><use href="#icon-download"/></svg>
  </span>
  Download Report
</a>

<!-- ── Spinning Refresh Indicator ────────────────── -->
<button class="icon-btn icon-btn--icon-only" aria-label="Refresh data" aria-busy="true">
  <span class="icon icon-md icon-spin" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><use href="#icon-refresh"/></svg>
  </span>
</button>

<!-- ── Status Banner ──────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="banner banner--success" role="status">
  <span class="icon icon-lg icon-color-success" role="img" aria-label="Success">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><use href="#icon-success"/></svg>
  </span>
  <span>Changes saved successfully.</span>
</div>

<!-- ── Inline with text ──────────────────────────── -->
<p>
  <span class="icon icon-sm icon-color-muted" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><use href="#icon-info"/></svg>
  </span>
  This action cannot be undone.
</p>
```

---

## 5. Optimization Guide

### 5.1 SVG Sprite Delivery

| Strategy | Bytes (gzipped) | HTTP Requests | Cachability | Best For |
|----------|-----------------|---------------|-------------|----------|
| Inline `<svg>` sprite | ~2.1 KB | 0 | Cached as part of HTML | SPAs, critical-path icons |
| External `icons.svg` + `<use>` | ~1.9 KB | 1 | ❌ CORS-restricted in legacy IE | Simple sites (polyfill needed for IE11) |
| External sprite + JS injection | ~1.5 KB data URI | 1 | ✅ via `localStorage` | Performance-obsessed (see pattern below) |
| Individual SVGs per `<img>` | ~6 KB (24 files) | 24 | ✅ per-file | NOT recommended — avoid |

**Recommendation:** Inline the sprite for up to ~5 KB uncompressed. It eliminates the extra round trip and works everywhere. For larger icon sets (50+), externalize and use a JS-injection cache pattern:

```javascript
// Advanced: fetch sprite, cache in localStorage for subsequent visits
(async function loadSprite() {
  const KEY = 'icon-sprite-v1';
  let sprite = localStorage.getItem(KEY);
  if (!sprite) {
    const res = await fetch('/icons/sprite.svg');
    sprite = await res.text();
    try { localStorage.setItem(KEY, sprite); } catch(e) { /* quota exceeded */ }
  }
  document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('afterbegin', sprite);
})();
```

### 5.2 SVG Minification

Run SVGO (or equivalent) on the sprite before production deployment:

```bash
# Install SVGO
npm install -g svgo

# Optimize the sprite (default preset is good)
svgo sprite.svg -o sprite.min.svg

# Aggressive preset (removes viewBox when safe — test thoroughly)
svgo --config='{ "plugins": [{ "removeViewBox": false }] }' sprite.svg -o sprite.min.svg
```

Key SVGO rules for icons:
- **Keep `viewBox`** — required for scaling
- **Remove `xmlns` on inline SVGs** — not needed in HTML5
- **Collapse paths** — merge multiple `<path>` elements where possible
- **Remove `fill="none"`** — redundant when `fill` is not set

### 5.3 CSS Delivery

- **Critical CSS:** Include `.icon`, `.icon-sm`, `.icon-md`, `.icon-btn`, and the button patterns in your critical (inlined `<style>`) CSS. The full color variants and hover states can load async.
- **Purge unused icon classes** in your build step (Tailwind's JIT, PurgeCSS, etc.) if you use a utility-based approach.
- **Tree-shake button patterns** you don't use — only ship the CSS for patterns actually employed in your design system.

### 5.4 Performance Checklist

- [ ] Sprite is inlined OR cached in `localStorage` (avoid extra HTTP round trip)
- [ ] SVG paths are minified (SVGO with conservative settings)
- [ ] Only `<symbol>` elements used (no duplicated path data)
- [ ] `viewBox` preserved on every `<symbol>` for correct scaling
- [ ] `currentColor` used everywhere; no hardcoded `fill="#..."` values
- [ ] Icon sizing classes (`icon-sm/md/lg/xl`) are in the critical CSS path
- [ ] `aria-hidden="true"` on all decorative icons
- [ ] `aria-label` on all interactive icon-only elements
- [ ] `focus-visible` outlines on all interactive icons
- [ ] Unused button patterns tree-shaken in production build
- [ ] Spinner animation uses `will-change: transform` or `transform` for GPU compositing
- [ ] Color variants mapped to CSS custom properties for easy theming

### 5.5 Browser Compatibility Notes

| Feature | Chrome | Firefox | Safari | Edge | IE11 |
|---------|--------|---------|--------|------|------|
| `<use href="#id">` | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ (use `xlink:href`) |
| `currentColor` in SVG | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| `focus-visible` | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ (polyfill) |
| CSS custom properties | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ (provide fallbacks) |

**IE11 fallback for `<use>`:**
```html
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">
  <use href="#icon-home" xlink:href="#icon-home"/>
</svg>
```

---

## 6. Icon Catalog Reference

| # | ID | Name | Category | Use Case |
|---|-----|------|----------|----------|
| 1 | `icon-home` | Home | Navigation | Primary nav, breadcrumbs |
| 2 | `icon-search` | Search | Navigation | Search bars, look-up triggers |
| 3 | `icon-menu` | Menu | Navigation | Mobile hamburger, sidebars |
| 4 | `icon-close` | Close | Navigation | Modals, drawers, dismiss actions |
| 5 | `icon-chevron-down` | Chevron Down | Navigation | Accordions, selects, "more" |
| 6 | `icon-chevron-up` | Chevron Up | Navigation | Collapse, "less" |
| 7 | `icon-chevron-left` | Chevron Left | Navigation | Carousels, back buttons |
| 8 | `icon-chevron-right` | Chevron Right | Navigation | Carousels, next buttons |
| 9 | `icon-arrow-right` | Arrow Right | Navigation | CTAs, "learn more", next page |
| 10 | `icon-arrow-left` | Arrow Left | Navigation | Back navigation, previous |
| 11 | `icon-plus` | Plus | Action | Add, create, expand |
| 12 | `icon-minus` | Minus | Action | Remove, collapse |
| 13 | `icon-check` | Check | Action | Confirm, save, select |
| 14 | `icon-edit` | Edit | Action | Edit, modify, compose |
| 15 | `icon-trash` | Trash | Action | Delete, remove, clear |
| 16 | `icon-refresh` | Refresh | Action | Reload, sync, update |
| 17 | `icon-download` | Download | Action | Save file, export |
| 18 | `icon-upload` | Upload | Action | Upload file, import |
| 19 | `icon-info` | Info | Status | Tooltips, help, details |
| 20 | `icon-warning` | Warning | Status | Alerts, cautions |
| 21 | `icon-error` | Error | Status | Errors, failures, blocking |
| 22 | `icon-success` | Success | Status | Confirmations, completion |
| 23 | `icon-user` | User | Object | Profiles, accounts, avatars |
| 24 | `icon-settings` | Settings | Object | Preferences, configuration |

---

## 7. Extending the System

### Adding a New Icon

1. Design the icon on a **24×24 grid** — keep strokes on whole or half-pixel coordinates.
2. Use `fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"` for outlined icons.
3. Use `fill="currentColor"` for solid/filled icons.
4. Add as a new `<symbol id="icon-{name}" viewBox="0 0 24 24">...</symbol>` inside the sprite.
5. Document in the catalog table above.
6. No CSS changes needed unless the icon requires a special animation.

### Theming with CSS Custom Properties

```css
:root {
  --color-primary:   #3b82f6;
  --color-secondary: #64748b;
  --color-success:   #22c55e;
  --color-warning:   #f59e0b;
  --color-danger:    #ef4444;
  --color-muted:     #94a3b8;
}

/* Dark theme override */
[data-theme="dark"] {
  --color-primary:   #60a5fa;
  --color-secondary: #94a3b8;
  --color-success:   #4ade80;
  --color-warning:   #fbbf24;
  --color-danger:    #f87171;
  --color-muted:     #64748b;
}
```

With this in place, every icon referencing a `--color-*` utility class automatically adapts to the current theme — no icon-path changes required.

---

## 8. Summary

| Deliverable | Status | Description |
|-------------|--------|-------------|
| SVG Sprite Sheet | ✅ | 24 symbols on a 24×24 grid, inline-ready |
| CSS Sizing | ✅ | 4 size classes: `icon-sm`(16), `icon-md`(24), `icon-lg`(32), `icon-xl`(48) |
| Color Inheritance | ✅ | `currentColor` on all icons; 6 semantic color utility classes |
| Accessibility | ✅ | `aria-label`, `aria-hidden`, `role="img"`, `focus-visible` patterns documented |
| Button Patterns | ✅ | 5 patterns: icon-only, labeled, trailing, ghost, pill |
| Optimization Guide | ✅ | Delivery strategies, SVGO config, CSS delivery, checklist, browser notes |
| Catalog | ✅ | Reference table with IDs, names, categories, and use cases |
| Extension Guide | ✅ | How to add icons, theming with CSS custom properties |

**Total system weight (uncompressed):** ~2.1 KB SVG + ~2.8 KB CSS = **~4.9 KB** (~1.8 KB gzipped).  
**Dependencies:** Zero. Works in any HTML page with no JavaScript required (JS only for the optional `localStorage` caching pattern).
